description: Predictive reasoning engine for anticipatory autonomy - enables the collective to anticipate future events, predict outcomes, and proactively prepare for scenarios

cli_commands.analyze: Analyze historical patterns and detect temporal/causal/performance trends
cli_commands.alerts: Check for active alerts from current predictions
cli_commands.prepare: Generate preparation actions for scenarios (usage: prepare [resource|consensus|all])
cli_commands.dashboard: Show prediction dashboard with active predictions, alerts, and pattern status

integration.self_model: Uses self-model capability data to improve prediction accuracy
integration.goal_arbitration: Uses active goals and historical completion rates
integration.thought_loop: Uses thought deltas and triggers for pattern detection
integration.memory: Uses deliberation history for temporal pattern analysis
